name: Aadi Bioscience Inc. Common Stock
summary: Aadi Bioscience, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing precision therapies for genetically defined cancers. Their lead product candidate is FYARRO (sirolimus albumin-bound nanoparticles) for the treatment of advanced malignant perivascular epithelioid cell tumors (PEComa). The company is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
